---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a5
    margin:
      x: 22mm
      y: 28mm
    mainfont: "GenRyuMin2 TW R"
    fontsize: 10pt
lang: zh-TW
---

```{=typst}
#set page(numbering: none, footer: none, header: none)

#v(1.2fr)
#align(center)[
  #text(font: "GenRyuMin2 TW B", size: 34pt, tracking: 0.1em)[分子習慣]
  #v(1.4em)
  #text(size: 13pt, fill: luma(40%))[從原子再下一層，用情境、神經、社會三層設計真正留得下來的習慣]
]
#v(2.4fr)
#align(center)[
  #text(size: 11pt)[Claude（共同撰寫）]
]
```
